summary: Comprehensive testing of Arabic Football News App completed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features working correctly including league selector, tab navigation, news display, standings table, and matches list. No critical issues found.

issues: Shadow style props deprecation warnings in console (not critical, cosmetic only)
useNativeDriver warning in web preview (expected behavior, not an issue in native app)

details.leagues_endpoint: ✓ Returns all 5 leagues with correct structure

news_endpoints.premier_league: ✓ 18 news items with titles, images, dates

standings_endpoints.premier_league: ✓ 20 teams with complete stats (Arsenal leading with 70 points)

matches_endpoints.premier_league: ✓ 3 matches with teams, time, channel info

frontend_test_results.app_loading: ✓ App loads successfully on mobile viewport (375x667)

tab_navigation.news_tab: ✓ Working, displays 18 news cards with images
tab_navigation.standings_tab: ✓ Working, displays standings table with team logos and stats

frontend_test_results.news_display: ✓ 18 news cards found with images loading correctly
frontend_test_results.notification_banner: ✓ Breaking news notification banner working as designed
frontend_test_results.error_handling: ✓ No error messages found on page

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: Clean FastAPI implementation with proper error handling (404 for invalid leagues)
✓ Backend: MongoDB caching implemented (5 min for news, 1 hour for standings, 10 min for matches)
✓ Backend: Web scraping from YallaKora working correctly for all leagues
✓ Frontend: Proper React Native components used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Image)
✓ Frontend: Arabic RTL layout properly configured with I18nManager
✓ Frontend: All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Integration: Backend and frontend communication working flawlessly
Minor: Shadow style props deprecated warnings (cosmetic, not breaking)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - app uses real-time web scraping from YallaKora
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs returning real data from YallaKora scraping. Frontend displaying data correctly with proper Arabic RTL layout. No bugs found. App is production-ready.
